title: PDF Viewer 90% fit + compact panel
description:
Fit-to-width uses 90% of panel width (not shrink-wrapped scroll width). Plan panel no longer forces 95vh in PDF Viewer — white box hugs sheet stack.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg64).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Fit avail width from panel, not content-sized scroll.
Viewer panel min-height removed — no dark 95vh grey void.
90% fit safety factor for 100% browser zoom.
